name: Department of Agricultural Marketing and Cooperatives (DAMC)
description: Mandates of the Department: 1) Facilitation of business linkages between porducers with domestic and international markets; 2) Establishment of RNR marketing system through market research and intelligence; 3) Registration and strengthening of Farmers Group (FG) and Cooperatives (Coop); 4) Coordinate and promote Enterprise(s) related to RNR activities; and 5) Provide post-production services to the farmers and entrepreneurs through research and development of appropriate technologies The Department is the national focal agency for providing support related to Cooperatives and Agricultural marketing services in the country. This government agency with 50 plus staff carries out the initiatives to fulfill the above mandates across the country.
